page_metadata.biotools__summary: FPSAC (Fast Phylogentic Scaffolding of Ancient Contigs) is a software for fast phylogenetic scaffolding of ancient contigs. The author apply it on a set of 2134 ancient contigs assembled from the recently sequenced Black Death agent genome.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: FPSAC (Fast Phylogentic Scaffolding of Ancient Contigs) is a software for fast phylogenetic scaffolding of ancient contigs. The author apply it on a set of 2134 ancient contigs assembled from the recently sequenced Black Death agent genome.
